title_zh: 纪念毛泽东主席诞辰一百一十四周年毛体书法展
title_en: Mao-Style Calligraphy Exhibition Commemorating the 114th Anniversary of Chairman Mao's Birth
description_zh: 二零零七年十二月在中国人民革命军事博物馆举办，展出一百一十四幅。
description_en: Held in December 2007 at the Military Museum of the Chinese People's Revolution, with 114 works exhibited.

title_zh: 敬临毛泽东主席书法作品汇报展
title_en: Report Exhibition of Calligraphy Works in Tribute to Chairman Mao
description_zh: 二零零八年相关作品展出。

title_zh: 东京中国书法美术作品展
title_en: China Calligraphy and Fine Arts Exhibition in Tokyo
description_zh: 二零零九年七月参展并获金奖。
description_en: Participated in July 2009 and won a gold award.

title_zh: 江山如此多娇红色书画展
title_en: The Land So Magnificent: Red-Themed Calligraphy and Painting Exhibition
description_zh: 二零一零年六月上海城市博览会期间举办，展出八十九幅。
description_en: Held in June 2010 during the Shanghai Urban Expo period, with 89 works exhibited.

title_en: Mao Zedong Poetry Calligraphy Treasures Exhibition
description_zh: 《仿毛体手抄毛泽东诗词汇报展》作品在该展展出。
description_en: Works from the report exhibition of hand-copied Mao Zedong poems in Mao style were shown in this exhibition.

title_zh: 纪念中新建交四十周年书画展
title_en: Calligraphy and Painting Exhibition Commemorating the 40th Anniversary of China–Singapore Diplomatic Relations

title_zh: 中国第十届艺术节古今书法艺术展
title_en: Ancient and Modern Calligraphy Exhibition at the 10th China Arts Festival

title_zh: 纪念毛泽东诞辰一百二十周年百名将军联合书画家书画展
title_en: Joint Calligraphy and Painting Exhibition by One Hundred Generals and Artists Commemorating the 120th Anniversary of Mao Zedong's Birth
description_zh: 二零一三年十二月在北京军事博物馆参展，展出一百二十幅。
description_en: Held in December 2013 at the Beijing Military Museum, with 120 works exhibited.

title_zh: 第三十五届巴黎卢浮宫当代国际艺术博览会
title_en: 35th Paris Louvre Contemporary International Art Expo
description_zh: 二零二五年受邀参展（依据资料文件名）。
description_en: Invited to exhibit in 2025 (based on source filenames).
